sqlMap.select:
/*PledgeReport.selectPledgeList*/ SELECT T.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , T.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , T.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , T.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , T.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , T.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 , T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , T.EXAM_CONT , T.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT_VIEW , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.TOT_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.DMN_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT0/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT0 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , CAST((T.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6/DECODE(#amtUnit#, NULL, 1, '', 1, '0', 1, #amtUnit#)) AS NUMERIC(19,0)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , TRIM(CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 0 THEN T.OFFICE_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 1 THEN T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM1 WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 2 THEN T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM2 WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL = 3 THEN T.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 3 THEN T.COMP_GROUND ELSE '' END) AS DGRCOMPO_NM , T.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS PARENT , CASE WHEN T.CHILD_CNT > 0 THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS IS_LEAF , 'true' AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , T.DGR_LEVEL AS "LEVEL" , CASE WHEN T.DGR_LEVEL > 3 THEN CASE WHEN SHEET_REPORT_CNT > 0 THEN 'O' ELSE 'X' END ELSE '' END AS SHEET_REPORT_YN FROM (SELECT A.DGRCOMPO_ID AS DGRCOMPO_ID , A.UP_DGRCOMPO_ID AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , A.DGR_LEVEL AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , A.EXAM_CONT , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 + A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT0 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , A.TOT_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , A.FRSC_AMT1 + A.FRSC_AMT2 + A.FRSC_AMT3 + A.FRSC_AMT4 + A.FRSC_AMT5 + A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT0 , A.FRSC_AMT1 AS FRSC_AMT1 , A.FRSC_AMT2 AS FRSC_AMT2 , A.FRSC_AMT3 AS FRSC_AMT3 , A.FRSC_AMT4 AS FRSC_AMT4 , A.FRSC_AMT5 AS FRSC_AMT5 , A.FRSC_AMT6 AS FRSC_AMT6 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 + A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT0 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT1 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT2 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT3 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT4 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT5 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , A.DMN_FRSC_AMT6 AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , A.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , A.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , A.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , A.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 + A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT0 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ1 AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ1 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM1 AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM1 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ2 AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ2 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM2 AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM2 , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , A.SHEET_REPORT_CNT AS SHEET_REPORT_CNT , NVL((SELECT NVL(Z.OFFICE_RANK020, Z.OFFICE_RANK) FROM TB_DGROFFICE020 Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS OFFICE_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.OFFICE_NM FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.OFFICE_CD = A.OFFICE_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS OFFICE_NM , NVL((SELECT Z.DEPT_RANK FROM TB_DGRDEPT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DEPT_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS PBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.PBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS PBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS UBIZ_RANK , NVL((SELECT Z.UBIZ_CD FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '0000000000000000') AS UBIZ_CD , NVL((SELECT Z.DBIZ_RANK FROM TB_DGRBIZ Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), 0) AS DBIZ_RANK , DECODE(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, NULL, '', '00000', '', SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4)) ||' ' || NVL((SELECT Z.TE_MNG_MOK_NM FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOK Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_MNG_MOK_CD = A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AND ROWNUM = 1), '') AS TE_MNG_MOK_NM , NVL((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_DGRCOMPO Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND Z.COMPO_LEVEL = 1), 0) AS CHILD_CNT FROM (SELECT T.* FROM (SELECT DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || '0000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID || '_' || A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS UP_DGRCOMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, 0, 2, 1, 3, 2, 4, 3, 3 + A.COMPO_LEVEL) AS DGR_LEVEL , A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', 2, '00000000000', 3, '00000000000', 4, '00000000000', A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID) AS PLEDGE_INFO_ID , DECODE(H.CT, 1, '00000000000', A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1) AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 , '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , SUM(DECODE(H.CT, 1, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 2, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 3, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6, 0), 4, DECODE(A.COMPO_LEVEL, '1', A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6, 0), A.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6)) AS YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , SUM(A.SHEET_REPORT_CNT) AS SHEET_REPORT_CNT FROM (SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR AS BGT_DGR , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AS UP_TE_BGT_COMPO_ID , A.DEPT_CD AS DEPT_CD , A.DBIZ_CD AS DBIZ_CD , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS TE_MNG_MOK_CD , A.TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ AS TE_BGT_COMPO_SEQ , A.COMPO_LEVEL AS COMPO_LEVEL , A.COMP_GROUND AS COMP_GROUND , A.SORT_SEQ AS SORT_SEQ , B.OFFICE_CD AS OFFICE_CD , I.PLEDGE_INFO_ID , H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 , H.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ1 , H.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '. ' || H.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM1 , G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 , G.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '. ' || G.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM2 , G.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ2 , F.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS PLEDGE_BIZ_ID , F.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ AS PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ , F.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '. ' || F.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS PLEDGE_BIZ_NM , E.EXAM_CONT AS EXAM_CONT , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 + E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 AS TOT_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 , E.YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.ADJ_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '160', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT1 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '110', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '120', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '130', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT2 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '140', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '150', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT3 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '180', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT4 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '190', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT5 , (SELECT NVL(SUM(DECODE(CC.STAND_FRSC_CD, '170', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '200', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, '210', BB.DMN_DEF_FRSC_AMT, 0)), 0) FROM TB_DGRCOMPOFRSC BB, TB_YEARFRSC CC WHERE 1 = 1 AND CC.FIS_YEAR = BB.FIS_YEAR AND CC.FRSC_FG_CD = BB.FRSC_FG_CD AND BB.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND BB.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND BB.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS DMN_FRSC_AMT6 , (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_SHEET Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) + (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_REPORT Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND Z.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND Z.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) AS SHEET_REPORT_CNT FROM TB_DGRCOMPO A , TB_DGRDEPT B , TB_DGRBIZ C , TB_PLEDGE E , TB_PLEDGEBIZ F , TB_PLEDGEBIZ G , TB_PLEDGEBIZ H , TB_PLEDGEINFO I WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND C.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND C.DBIZ_CD = A.DBIZ_CD AND B.FIS_YEAR = A.FIS_YEAR AND B.BGT_DGR = A.BGT_DGR AND B.DEPT_CD = A.DEPT_CD AND A.FIS_YEAR = E.FIS_YEAR AND A.BGT_DGR = E.BGT_DGR AND A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = E.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID AND I.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = F.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AND I.DEL_YN = 'N' AND H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = G.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND H.DEL_YN = 'N' AND G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = F.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND G.DEL_YN = 'N' AND F.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = E.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' AND F.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId#
AND H.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId1#
AND G.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId2#
AND E.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId#
AND E.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND E.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr#
AND B.OFFICE_CD = #officeCd#
AND B.DEPT_RANK >= #deptRankFr#
AND B.DEPT_RANK <= #deptRankTo#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD >= #teMngMokCdFr#
AND A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD <= #teMngMokCdTo#
) A , (SELECT ROWNUM AS CT FROM TB_COMMCD WHERE ROWNUM BETWEEN 1 AND 5) H WHERE 1 = 1
AND A.SHEET_REPORT_CNT > 0
AND A.SHEET_REPORT_CNT = 0
GROUP BY DECODE(H.CT, 1, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 2, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 3, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || '00000000000' || '_' || '00000000000' , 4, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID || '_' || '00000000000' , 5, A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || TO_CHAR(A.BGT_DGR, '000') || '_' || A.OFFICE_CD || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2 || '_' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID || '_' || A.TE_BGT_COMPO_ID) ) T ) A ) T WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY T.FIS_YEAR , NVL(T.BGT_DGR, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_RANK, 0) , NVL(T.OFFICE_CD, '0000') , NVL(T.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ1, 0) , NVL(T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID1, '00000000000') , NVL(T.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ2, 0) , NVL(T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID2, '00000000000') , NVL(T.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ, 0) , NVL(T.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID, '00000000000') , NVL(T.SORT_SEQ, 0)
sqlMap.update: /*PledgeReport.updatePledge*/ UPDATE TB_PLEDGE SET EXAM_CONT = NVL(#examCont#, '') , TOT_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#totFrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#totFrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#totFrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#totFrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#totFrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , TOT_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#totFrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#year1FrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#year1FrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#year1FrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#year1FrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#year1FrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR1_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#year1FrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#year2FrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#year2FrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#year2FrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#year2FrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#year2FrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR2_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#year2FrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#year3FrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#year3FrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#year3FrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#year3FrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#year3FrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR3_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#year3FrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#year4FrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#year4FrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#year4FrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#year4FrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#year4FrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR4_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#year4FrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT1 = NVL(#year5FrscAmt1#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT2 = NVL(#year5FrscAmt2#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT3 = NVL(#year5FrscAmt3#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT4 = NVL(#year5FrscAmt4#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT5 = NVL(#year5FrscAmt5#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , YEAR5_FRSC_AMT6 = NVL(#year5FrscAmt6#, 0) * NVL(#amtUnit#, 1) , MODI_ID = #userId# , MODI_DATE = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE 1 = 1 AND PLEDGE_BIZ_ID = #pledgeBizId# AND FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND TE_BGT_COMPO_ID = #teBgtCompoId#
sqlMap.select: /*PledgeReport.selectPledgeInfo*/ SELECT A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM || '(' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD, 7, 2) || ' ~ ' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_END_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_END_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTRING(A.PLEDGE_END_YMD, 7, 2) || ')' AS PLEDGE_INFO , A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AS PLEDGE_INFO_ID , A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM AS PLEDGE_INFO_NM , A.PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD AS PLEDGE_BEGIN_YMD , A.PLEDGE_END_YMD AS PLEDGE_END_YMD FROM TB_PLEDGEINFO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID = #pledgeInfoId#
